## 1. COMPANY DEEP DIVE

### Founding & History

FP Markets (now **FP Trading** as of March 2026) was founded in **2005** in **Sydney, Australia** by **Murat Akdeniz**. The company started as an Australian-focused forex and CFD broker, growing rapidly through competitive pricing and ECN execution to become one of Australia's leading retail brokers.

FP Markets built its reputation on **ultra-tight ECN spreads** and a commitment to transparent, low-cost trading. The company was an early adopter of cTrader in Australia and has consistently expanded its platform offering to include MT4, MT5, cTrader, TradingView, and its proprietary IRESS platform for share trading.

In **March 2026**, FP Markets LLC announced a rebranding to **FP Trading LLC**, with a new name and look while maintaining the same trading experience. The rebrand reflects the company's evolution from a pure forex broker into a multi-asset trading platform.

### Key Milestones

| Year | Milestone |
|------|-----------|
| 2005 | Founded in Sydney, Australia by Murat Akdeniz |
| 2005 | Obtained ASIC AFSL #286354 |
| 2010 | Launched MT4 platform support |
| 2013 | Introduced IRESS platform for share trading |
| 2018 | Obtained CySEC license #371/18, entering EU market |
| 2019 | Added cTrader platform support |
| 2020 | Reached 10,000+ tradable instruments |
| 2021 | Named "Best Global Forex Value Broker" (Global Forex Awards) |
| 2022 | Named "Best Global Forex Value Broker" again |
| 2023 | Named "Best Global Forex Value Broker" third consecutive year |
| 2024 | Expanded to 70+ commodities, integrated TradingView |
| 2025 | Obtained CMA Kenya license, expanded African operations |
| 2026 | Rebranded to "FP Trading" |

### CEO & Management Team

- **Founder:** Murat Akdeniz — Australian entrepreneur who built FP Markets from a local CFD provider into a global multi-asset broker
- FP Markets is **privately held** — no IPO has occurred
- The company has grown to serve clients in 80+ countries
